word: H5107 - נוּב - nûwb - noob - Bring forth

sections.paragraph:
Original: נוּב

Transliteration: nûb

Phonetic: noob

BDB Definition:

  1. to bear fruit
    1. (Qal) to bear fruit
    2. (Pilel) to make to flourish (figuratively)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1318

Part(s) of speech: Verb
